title: CLI sections and binary map detail
purpose: Expose binary map information outside the TUI for quick PE/ELF triage, including section layout and offset mapping evidence.
actions: Render section name, virtual address, file offset, size, flags, entropy

criteria: CLI can list indexed sections for a PE/ELF artifact
Output includes file offset and virtual address side by side
JSON schema is stable enough for report scripts
Tests cover section records with and without file_offset
